meaning: n.[药]去甲肾上腺素,降肾上腺素
examples: Methods: High dosage of noradrenalin was given by intravenous drip for many times.
Noradrenalin regulates energy levels, helping you to get up in the morning and sleep at night.
Objective: To investigate the release of myocardial noradrenalin during acute myocardial hibernation.
